interpretation: A CLI tool that takes a natural-language project idea and produces a structured, validated specification through multi-model triangulation.

must: Accept free-form text input describing a project idea
Produce a structured spec with MoSCoW-prioritised requirements
Support iterative user feedback loop before approval
could: Generate a visual dependency graph of requirements

open_questions.question: Should the spec include time estimates?

risks.risk: Ambiguous input may lead to divergent expansions

success_criteria: Approved spec has zero unresolved decisions
All MUST requirements have clear acceptance criteria
